title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Carrier India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Carrier India
jsonLd.description:
We at Carrier India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Carrier India:
Carrier India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Carrier India!
